college_pledge: I solemnly pledge to work with dedication to preserve and strengthen freedom and integrity of the nation. I further affirm that I shall never resort to violence and that all differences and disputes relating to religion, language, region, or other political or economic grievances should be settled by peaceful and Constitutional means.

eo_ttd_direct.availability: First Friday of every month 8:30 AM to 9:30 AM

library_rules.books_scheme: 2 books for BC SC ST students per term on production of MRO caste certificate
rules: Library open to all students and staff.
Outsiders not permitted.
Payments of fine in college office.
Absence from college is no excuse.
If book lost/damaged borrower must replace or pay cost.
Borrower must report any defect at time of borrowing.
No sub-lending of borrowed books.
All books must be returned at end of academic year.
Staff suggest books for purchase through HoD.
Staff must renew borrowed books each term.
Books unrelated to subject borrowed for one month only.
Stock-taking recall of books.
Staff getting transfer/leave/retirement must return all books and get No Dues certificate.
Reference books and current periodicals cannot be borrowed.
Only one periodical at a time.
library_rules.working_hours: 9:30 AM to 5:00 PM on all working days

mentor_system.description: Each class mentor supervises academic progress and advises students on matters connected with their general welfare.
mentor_system.student_guidance: Students are advised to consider their Mentors as local guardians.

fee_regulations.migration_pass_certificate_fee: Payable to S.V. University for students from other Universities
fee_regulations.removal_from_rolls: Name removed if fees not paid at start of semester

ragging_policy.punishment: Imprisonment 6 months OR fine Rs.5,000 OR both; Dismissal from college without notice
ragging_policy.status: STRICTLY PROHIBITED - IT IS A CRIME NOT OUR CULTURE

rules_of_attendance.benefit_procedure: Vice-President recommends within three days of absence
rules_of_attendance.condonation_outcome: Students with 50% attendance must make up deficiency next year; eligible for supplementary exams but NOT eligible to study higher courses
leave_not_granted_if: Student does not apply before going on leave
rules: Attendance calculated for each month.
Attendance taken for every lecture, practical, or tutorial class.
Students coming late to classes are liable to be fined.
Medical Certificate required for absence due to illness.
Each day absence without leave counted as absent for two days.
Name removed from rolls if absent without leave for more than three days.
Absence for one hour in any session counted as absence for the session.
If leave applied then cancelled, student must write to Principal immediately on returning.

classroom_rules: Students shall rise and remain standing when teacher enters till asked to sit.
No student shall leave the classroom without permission.
Lodging and mess inspected by college staff periodically.
Indecent behaviour inside or outside premises dealt with by the Principal.

dress_code.boys: Sky Blue shirt and Navy Blue pant
dress_code.girls: Blue salwar kameez Navy Blue bottom and sky blue top

rules_of_discipline.identity_card: Must always be worn; compulsory at University Semester Examination
rules_of_discipline.internal_exam: Held at end of each Semester
prohibited: Taking part in public demonstrations, political agitations or strikes
punishments_by_principal: Cancellation of attendance Scholarship and fee concessions
Withholding of Transfer Progress and Conduct Certificates
Suspension expulsion or dismissal from the college
rules_of_discipline.tests: Conducted from time to time; serious action for absence without prior HoD permission

list.eligibility: Children of ex-servicemen with not less than 5 years service
list.name: Scholarship for children of Ex-servicemen

srivari_seva_programme.purpose: Instill dedication devotion and selfless service in students

violations_and_penalties.violation: Writing names register numbers initials in answer books
Actual use of books/material for copying
Tampering with Supervisor Member on main answer books
Assaulting invigilator/Chief Superintendent on college campus

penalties: Immediate police report by Chief Superintendent
violations_and_penalties.violation: Assaulting Asst. Superintendent/Chief Superintendent outside campus

mission: To inculcate spiritual and moral values among the students and make them responsible future citizens.
To build competent, committed and reflective professionals.
To empower the students to fulfil their academic and professional passions.
vision: To transform mediocre students into socially responsible citizens by providing better education along with skills, ethics and spirituality.
To extend the bounds of knowledge and create a broadminded vision of life through multidisciplinary curriculum and mould them as wholesome personalities.
